text: All things which are violins are string instruments. All things which are violins are musical instruments. It follows that some musical instruments are string instruments.

premise1.subject: thing which is a violin
premise1.raw_text: All things which are violins are string instruments

premise2.subject: thing which is a violin
premise2.raw_text: All things which are violins are musical instruments

conclusion.subject: musical instrument
conclusion.raw_text: It follows that some musical instruments are string instruments

validity_details.reason: Valid syllogistic form: Darapti (requires existential import)
